CREATE TABLE xml_test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, xml_data XMLType);
INSERT INTO xml_test_table (id, xml_data) VALUES (1, createXML('<sample attr="value1"/>'));
INSERT INTO xml_test_table (id, xml_data) VALUES (2, createXML('<sample attr="value2"/>', 'http://www.example.com/sample.xsd'));
SELECT id, xml_data.extract('sample/@attr') AS attr_value FROM xml_test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, xml_data.extract('sample/@attr') AS attr_value FROM xml_test_table WHERE id = 2;
INSERT INTO xml_test_table (id, xml_data) VALUES (3, createXML('<nested><child attr="value3"/></nested>'));
SELECT xml_data, xml_data.extract('nested/child/@attr') AS child_attr FROM xml_test_table WHERE id = 3;
INSERT INTO xml_test_table (id, xml_data) VALUES (4, createXML('<sample attr="value4"/>', NULL));
SELECT id, xml_data.getSchemaURL() FROM xml_test_table WHERE xml_data IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO xml_test_table (id, xml_data) VALUES (5, createXML('<invalid>'));
SELECT id, xml_data FROM xml_test_table WHERE xml_data IS NULL OR id < 0;
INSERT INTO xml_test_table (id, xml_data) VALUES (6, createXML('<outer><inner><deep attr="value5"/></inner></outer>'));
SELECT id, xml_data.extract('outer/inner/deep/@attr') AS deep_attr FROM xml_test_table WHERE id = 6;
INSERT INTO xml_test_table (id, xml_data) VALUES (7, createXML('<test><subtest attr="value6"><empty/></subtest></test>'));
SELECT xml_data.extract('test/subtest/@attr'), xml_data.extract('test/subtest/empty') FROM xml_test_table WHERE id = 7;
